## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Spec clarification
- [ ] Template update
- [ ] Example update
- [ ] Script/tooling update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security or governance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is generic and not tied to a private domain workflow.
- [ ] New or changed behavior is documented.
- [ ] Templates or examples remain vendor-neutral where practical.
- [ ] Security, permission, and source-authority implications were considered.
- [ ] I checked for accidental secrets, local paths, or private data.

## Notes for Reviewers

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to:
